title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into and Sign in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Cooperative Development Authority (CDA) - Calamba Extension Office for the Cooperative Promotion, Organization and Development in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 10/24/2022)
